videos.headline: Will Johnson takes the INT to the house for Michigan
videos.description: Will Johnson jumps the route and takes the interception to the crib on the second play of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Will Johnson takes the INT to the house for Michigan) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michigan go up 23-3 on J.J. McCarthy's hard-nose rushing TD
videos.description: J.J. McCarthy breaks a tackle and runs over a man on his way to a Wolverines touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michigan go up 23-3 on J.J. McCarthy's hard-nose rushing TD ) 2023/10/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Daniel Jackson makes an incredible catch for a Minnesota TD
videos.description: Daniel Jackson somehow comes away with an impressive grab to pull the Golden Gophers closer before halftime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Daniel Jackson makes an incredible catch for a Minnesota TD) 2023/10/07 ESHEET
